use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Executing destructive actions like delete or cancel
Toggling UI states in dashboards and interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable Button component using class-variance-authority (CVA) for flexible variant and size configurations. Features 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), with Radix UI Slot for composition patterns. Styled with subtle shadows and rounded corners for a modern, accessible interface. Supports disabled states, focus visibility, and SVG shrinking for icon buttons.
